summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DressApp Phase 5 - Admin Dashboard + Accessibility/SEO. All major features working correctly including image-edit pipeline swap to FLUX.1-schnell, admin dashboard with 7 tabs, provider activity tracking, accessibility features, and SEO improvements.

ui_bugs.issue: Page titles not updating immediately on navigation

passed_tests: Backend: All admin endpoints (overview, users, listings, transactions, providers, trend-scout, llm-usage, system)
Backend: Admin authentication and authorization working
Backend: Listing status changes with validation
Backend: Provider activity tracking with multiple services
Backend: Trend-scout run generating cards successfully
Backend: LLM usage endpoint never returns 500
Backend: System endpoint shows all 7 API keys present, no secrets exposed
Backend: Image edit regression - FLUX.1-schnell working (no longer 503)
Frontend: SEO - proper titles, descriptions, og/twitter meta, canonical URLs
Frontend: Accessibility - skip-to-content link, focus-visible, prefers-reduced-motion
Frontend: Admin dashboard with all 7 tabs functional
Frontend: Admin menu item only visible for admin users
Frontend: Admin and /me pages have noindex robots meta
Frontend: All existing flows work (home, closet, stylist, market, transactions)
Static files: robots.txt (200), sitemap.xml (200, 7 URLs), manifest.json (200, name='DressApp')
